title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that humans cannot compete with AI on knowledge accumulation and should instead focus on curiosity, human judgment, and creative discovery. He invokes mathematician Ramanujan's legacy to illustrate how exceptional human insight can reshape entire fields and identify undiscovered talent that systems overlook.
